About

Built by a Liverpool supporter, for Liverpool supporters. The idea was simple — have a fast, clean way to check fixtures, results and head-to-head records without navigating a full website or downloading a separate calendar app.

Search opponents, browse by competition, plan trips around away games and export matches straight to your calendar — all in one place.

Author

Duffers

A Liverpool fan who builds small apps to scratch everyday itches. LFC Fixtures is one of several tools built to make following the club that little bit easier.

Add to Home Screen

Install this app on your device for the full experience — no App Store needed.

1
iPhone / iPad (Safari) — tap the Share button (box with arrow) at the bottom of the screen, then choose Add to Home Screen.
2
Android (Chrome) — tap the three-dot menu in the top right, then choose Add to Home Screen or Install App.
3
Desktop (Chrome / Edge) — look for the install icon (⊕) in the address bar and click it.

Once installed, the app opens full-screen like a native app and updates automatically whenever a new version is released.

Refreshing the App

Normal tap on the ↺ button in the header re-fetches the latest fixture data.

Long-press (hold for 2 seconds) on the ↺ button does a full app refresh — clears the cached version and reloads the latest code from the server. Useful if an update doesn't seem to have come through.

Your Away Planner trips and preferences are stored separately and are never affected by a refresh.

v15.0.0
